command: python -m pip install -r requirements-colab.txt && python -m scripts.branchynet_cifar_sweep --output-name branchynet_mobilenet_cifar100_003 --dataset cifar100 --arch mobilenetv2_x0_5 --exit-modules features.5,features.12 --branch-depths 1,1 --epochs 10 --batch-size 128 --threshold-val-size 5000 --learning-rate 0.001 --weight-decay 1e-4 --loss-weights 1,1,1 --threshold-candidates 9 --max-threshold-combinations 2000 --require-cuda
